title: Better Biome Blend Continued
description: Improved version of Better Biome Blend.
body:
**Performance Improvements**

The blending algorithm has been optimized to run faster by processing colors in two passes instead of all at once. Memory usage is more efficient thanks to better cache management and reusing objects instead of creating new ones constantly. The mod also uses pre-calculated values instead of doing the same math repeatedly, which speeds things up noticeably.

**Bug Fixes**

Fixed a bug where OptiFine compatibility wasn't working correctly due to incorrect code. Improved how the mod handles multiple threads to prevent crashes. Corrected issues with color blending that could cause visual glitches.
